since_last: 71% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.75%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 71% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.02% · BTC -4.24% · Gold -2.48% · Nasdaq100 +2.36%. 71% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.75%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.75%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +12.36%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +12.36%, INTC +11.31%, SMCI +10.13%, SMR +10.04%, MU +9.43%. Laggards: INOD -8.49%, SPCX -6.18%, IBM -4.01%, WDAY -2.31%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.18% at $179.97
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.18% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
